proposalSnapshot.message: Har subah jb meri aankhein khulti hai to phla kyal aapka aata hai. you are the best in the world jo mujhe hamesha sikhata hai ki hame jindagi kaise jini chahiye kaise unko ham khusiyo se bhar sakte hai. you are the most precosius [person in my life. jo hamesha mere sath rahta hai
proposalSnapshot.howWeMet: Ham school time pe mile start me achhi dosti hui school life bahut hi achhi thi then hamne college kiya kabhi ham door rhe to kabhi pass aisi hi hmari mulakat hui
proposalSnapshot.whyILoveYou: Because he is unique person in the world.  His behaviour and kindness really impressed me that's why i love him soo much.
proposalSnapshot.futureDreams: our future dream is live together with love kinfdness and respect. we live in hvery happy way.
